creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
There's no home page icon at <https://www.freshports.org/net/rinetd/>. 

<http://www.boutell.com/rinetd/> (within <https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/attachment.cgi?id=245482&action=diff#b/net/rinetd/Makefile_sec1>) redirects to <https://www.boutell.co.uk/payday-loans/> for payday loans. 

I guess, this will be a suitable URL for WWW:

https://github.com/samhocevar/rinetd/
